question: Are the per-point captures present, RTK-fix-quality acceptable, and recorded reliably?
operator_action: Re-occupy affected points; verify FIXED fix before storing
aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across CHECK_POINT-role per_point_completeness, k=0.25
gate_condition: every CHECK_POINT-role point has cp_fix_type_score=0 (all FLOAT or AUTONOMOUS) OR cp_position_sigma_score=0

question: Is per-point operator metadata trustworthy and baseline/mountpoint correctly configured?
operator_action: Re-measure antenna height; verify mountpoint; bipod or tilt-comp rover
aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across CHECK_POINT-role per_point_setup_confidence, k=0.25
indicators_within: cp_antenna_height_documented_score(0.40), cp_pole_stability_score(0.20), cp_baseline_length_score(0.15), cp_ntrip_mountpoint_score(0.10), cp_antenna_type_match_score(0.10), cp_device_id_match_score(0.05)

question: Was the sky and environment good at each capture moment?
operator_action: Relocate next time; accept noise; capture at lower-iono time
aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across CHECK_POINT-role per_point_environment, k=0.25
